question: Where is the soccer player in the image? Select from the following options: (A) Kicking the ball away from himself. (B) Running towards the ball. (C) Standing still with the ball at his feet. (D) Jumping in mid-air trying to head the ball.
gold_answer: Standing still with the ball at his feet
answer_choices: Kicking the ball away from himself
Standing still with the ball at his feet
Jumping in mid-air trying to head the ball
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
